message:
Command `# ABC running (PID 311078). 10.75 min elapsed. Log paused at 22.3MB (11:14).
# ABC was at ~4 min when it started. So ABC has been running ~6 min.
# Per previous run: ABC ran ~5 min. This run is similar.
# Let's check ABC process progress.
ps -p 311078 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime,wchan 2>/dev/null
echo ""
# Check if there are any ABC output files growing
ls -lh /tmp/yosys-abc-*/abc.script 2>/dev/null | head -3 || echo "No ABC script found in /tmp"
find /tmp -name "*.abc" -newer /tmp/librelane_final.log 2>/dev/null | head -3` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "# ABC running (PID 311078). 10.75 min elapsed. Log paused at 22.3MB (11:14).
# ABC was at ~4 min when it started. So ABC has been running ~6 min.
# Per previous run: ABC ran ~5 min. This run is similar.
# Let's check ABC process progress.
ps -p 311078 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime,wchan 2>/dev/null
echo ""
# Check if there are any ABC output files growing
ls -lh /tmp/yosys-abc-*/abc.script 2>/dev/null | head -3 || echo "No ABC script found in /tmp"
find /tmp -name "*.abc" -newer /tmp/librelane_final.log 2>/dev/null | head -3", "timeout": 10}
function.name: execute_bash

PID STAT %CPU %MEM     ELAPSED WCHAN

extras.command:
# ABC running (PID 311078). 10.75 min elapsed. Log paused at 22.3MB (11:14).
# ABC was at ~4 min when it started. So ABC has been running ~6 min.
# Per previous run: ABC ran ~5 min. This run is similar.
# Let's check ABC process progress.
ps -p 311078 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime,wchan 2>/dev/null
echo ""
# Check if there are any ABC output files growing
ls -lh /tmp/yosys-abc-*/abc.script 2>/dev/null | head -3 || echo "No ABC script found in /tmp"
find /tmp -name "*.abc" -newer /tmp/librelane_final.log 2>/dev/null | head -3
